emails.subject: Deal extension for 11/21/2000 for 98-439
emails.body: Deal extension for 11/21/2000 for 98-439 Victor, Can you extend deal #465490 to cover a flow volume of 141 dec. for 11/21/2000? Daren, Can you extend deal #465322 for cover a flow volume of 140 dec. for 11/21/2000? Thanks -Jackie- 3-9497

emails.subject: Re: Deal extension for 11/21/2000 for 98-439
emails.body: Re: Deal extension for 11/21/2000 for 98-439 Jackie, 465490 is not a deal between ENA and HPL.. It is a Zone 5 Tennessee sale between ENA and a third party...Thanks Jackie Young 12/19/2000 09:02 AM

emails.body: I extended the deal 462490 for 11/21 to cover the extra volume. There is a path in Unify already so Volume Mgt. should be able actualize volumes. Jackie Young 12/19/2000 09:30 AM
